title: HeyBail
description: For the HeyBail modded server. Intended for Fabric 1.20.4
body:
# For the HeyBail private modded server. Intended only for Fabric 1.20.4. 

Notice: No current plans on updating to a different version

This modpack is focused on optimization, customizablity, and fun in a multiplayer world/server.

## As of the latest version, HeyBail contains these mods:

- 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw
- AdvancementInfo by Giselbaer
- Anvil Fix Reborn by bsasealteam6
- AppleSkin by squeek502
- Better Clouds by qendolin
- Better Mount HUD by Lortseam
- BetterF3 by TreyRuffy
- Bookshelf by Darkhax
- Bundle Jumble by Strubbelkopp
- Capes by caelthecolher
- Chat Heads by dzwdz
- Chunks fade in by kerudion
- Cloth Config API by shedaniel
- Clumps by jaredlll08
- Collective by Serilum
- Continuity by PepperCode1
- Customizable Elytra by hidoni
- Debugify by isxander
- Durability Tooltip by SuperMartijn642
- Dynamic FPS by juliand665
- Elytra Trinket by Lakuna
- Entity Culling by tr7zw
- Fabric API by modmuss50
- Fabric Language Kotlin by modmuss50
- FabricSkyboxes by AMereBagatelle
- Fabrication by unascribed
- FastQuit by KingContaria
- FerriteCore by malte0811
- Forge Config API Port by Fuzs
- Friendly Fire by Darkhax
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright) by Sjouwer
- ImmediatelyFast by RaphiMC
- Indium by comp500
- LambDynamicLights by LambdAurora
- Lithium by jellysquid3
- Memory Leak Fix by FX
- MixinTrace by comp500
- Mod Menu by Terraformers
- Model Gap Fix by MehVahdJukaar
- ModernFix by embeddedt
- More Chat History by JackFred2
- More Culling by FX
- Mouse Tweaks by YaLTeR
- No Chat Reports by Aizistral
- Open Loader by Darkhax
- Open Parties and Claims by thexaero
- OptiGUI by opekope2
- Reese's Sodium Options by FlashyReese
- Shulker Box Tooltip by MisterPeModder
- Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax
- Sit by bl4ckscor3
- Sodium by jellysquid3
- Sound Physics Remastered by henkelmax
- Starlight (Fabric) by spottedleaf
- SuperMartijn642's Config Lib by SuperMartijn642
- SuperMartijn642's Core Lib by SuperMartijn642
- Trinkets by Emi
- Wakes by Goby56
- Wildfire's Female Gender Mod by WildfireRomeo
- Xaero's Minimap by thexaero
- Xaero's World Map by thexaero
- YetAnotherConfigLib by isxander
- Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR) by shedaniel
- Zoomify by isxander
- [EMF] Entity Model Features by Traben
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features by Traben
